footer_description: A curated digital art collection, powered by artificial intelligence.
home_sub_1: Where the dust of forgotten years settles on timeless canvas
home_sub_2: Enter a corridor where brushstrokes whisper stories of a thousand lifetimes
home_sub_3: Unlock the quiet memories of humanity's soul, curated by intelligence
auth_login_intro: Return to your private gallery, saved artworks, and AI-assisted discoveries.
auth_login_error: Unable to sign in. Check your credentials.
auth_login_art_caption: Explore paintings through mood, color, and memory.
auth_register_intro: Start collecting favorites, uploading artwork, and receiving tailored recommendations.
auth_register_error: Registration failed. That email may already be in use.
auth_register_art_caption: Build a personal wall of artworks that keep calling you back.
password_hint: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 special character.
password_min_error: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password_uppercase_error: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter.
password_special_error: Password must contain at least 1 special character.
ai_search_intro: Ask by artist, color, style, mood, surface, or a painting you want something similar to.
ai_search_placeholder: e.g. blue paintings similar to Water Lilies
ai_search_empty_title: Ask for the kind of art you want.
ai_search_error: Search is rate-limited or temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
try_broader_search: Try a broader color, artist, style, or surface.
upload_intro: Add a work to the Aurelis collection. Your image is saved to the database immediately, then held for admin review before it appears in the public gallery.
click_to_browse: or click to browse · JPEG, PNG, WebP · up to 5 MB
upload_file_type_error: Unsupported file. Please use JPG, JPEG, PNG or WEBP.
upload_choose_image_error: Please choose an image to upload.
upload_required_error: Title, artist, description and category are required.
upload_saved_review: It is saved in the database and will appear publicly after review.
title: Title
artist_placeholder: Your name or the artist's name
ai_summary_intro: Generate a concise curatorial note for this work using Aurelis's assistant.
summary_unavailable: The summary service is unavailable. An OpenAI API key must be configured on the server.
recommendations_empty: Browse and favorite a few works to seed your recommendations.
no_uploads_yet: You haven't uploaded any artworks yet.
recognition_intro: Upload an image and Aurelis will infer its style and category, extract the dominant color palette, and surface related works from the collection.
recognition_file_size_error: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
recognition_choose_image_error: Please choose an image before analysis.
recognition_browse_hint: or browse JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP up to 5 MB
recognition_empty_result: Recognition results will appear here after analysis.
